MELItem.Title: Overhead Flight Crew Rest (OFCR) Supply Shutoff and Smoke Clearance/Exhaust Valves

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.

ListItem.Para: Supply shutoff valve is deactivated closed.
Exhaust valve is deactivated closed.
OFCR is deactivated closed.
Operational procedure is used.

Note.Para: These provisions are not intended to prohibit OFCR inspections by crew members.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the OFCR supply shutoff valve closed, exhaust valve closed and OFCR closed (AMM DDG 21-29-01).

ListItem.Para: Deactivate the OFCR supply shutoff and exhaust valves.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
EXHAUST SOV CLOSE- FLT CREW REST
EXHAUST SOV OPEN- FLT CREW REST
SUPPLY SOV CLOSE- FLT CREW REST
SUPPLY SOV OPEN- FLT CREW REST
Gain access to the crew rest supply shutoff and exhaust valves.
Turn the manual open/close knob until the OFCR supply shutoff valve is closed.
Turn the manual open/close knob until the OFCR exhaust valve is closed.
Deactivate OFCR closed.
Remove all baggage and personal items from the OFCR.

Note.Para: Blankets, pillows and other items normally used in the crew rest may remain.

ListItem.Para: Close the OFCR entrance door.

OperationProcedure.Para: The OFCR is not available for inflight use. Remove personal items and do not enter except for inspections by crew members.
For augmented flight crew operations, flight crew duty periods should be adjusted appropriately.

DispatchCondition.Title: Procedures Do Not Require Its Use

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.

ListItem.Para: Supply shutoff valve is deactivated closed.
Exhaust valve is deactivated closed.
OFCR is deactivated closed.
Procedures do not require its use.

Note.Para: These provisions are not intended to prohibit OFCR inspections by crew members.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the OFCR supply shutoff valve closed, exhaust valve closed and OFCR closed (AMM DDG 21-29-01).

ListItem.Para: Deactivate the OFCR supply shutoff and exhaust valves.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
EXHAUST SOV CLOSE- FLT CREW REST
EXHAUST SOV OPEN- FLT CREW REST
SUPPLY SOV CLOSE- FLT CREW REST
SUPPLY SOV OPEN- FLT CREW REST
Gain access to the crew rest supply shutoff and exhaust valves.
Turn the manual open/close knob until the OFCR supply shutoff valve is closed.
Turn the manual open/close knob until the OFCR exhaust valve is closed.
Deactivate OFCR closed.
Remove all baggage and personal items from the OFCR.

Note.Para: Blankets, pillows and other items normally used in the crew rest may remain.

ListItem.Para: Close the OFCR entrance door.

OperationProcedure.Para: The OFCR is not available for inflight use. Remove personal items and do not enter except for inspections by crew members.
For augmented flight crew operations, flight crew duty periods should be adjusted appropriately.
